Specifications
Length * Width * Height: 23.60 x 35.40 x 0.40 inches                      Length * Width * Height (Package): 38.90 x 25.50 x 1.40 inches
Weight: 4.10 lb                                                                                  Weight: 8.70 lb
Product Code: ZHUMI-GCB-3624IN-B2 Specification: white
Description:

  • 【Magnetic Whiteboard With Accessories】Overall Size (frame included): 35.4" x 23.6", Writing Surface Size: 33.6" x 21.8"; Comes with 1 dry eraser, 2 dry erase markers, 4 magnets, 1 pen holder and fixing kits.
  • 【Smooth Writing & Easy to Wipe】This magnetic dry erase board has multiple coating materials，lets all dry erase markers write smoothly and wipe clean easily, without ghosting, providing you with an excellent writing experience!
  • 【Premium Quality】Sturdy thickened aluminium frame, smooth high-grade nylon plastic corners, no sharp or pointed edges, all of these enhances its stability and ensure the safety for you to use. Fixing detachable marker tray included, lets you keep essential supplies close at hand.
  • 【Versatile Installation】Flexible installation, either horizontally or vertically.Easily customize the white board's orientation to fit your space and needs.
  • 【Multiple Uses】 Perfect for office meetings, school teaching and home presentations, dual as a bulletin board by using magnets to pin notes, messages, pictures, calendars and more.
